keyPointsSummary: Modal passive: can be / should be / must be / may be + V3
Formula stays consistent: modal + be + V3
Used often in formal writing, news, and instructions

quickQuiz.hindi: यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।
quickQuiz.answer: This work will be completed tomorrow.

quickQuiz.hindi: इस समस्या को हल किया जा सकता है।
यह नियम पालन किया जाना चाहिए।

quickQuiz.answer: This letter will be sent tomorrow.

quickQuiz.hindi: इस गलती को सुधारा जा सकता है।
यह decision जल्दी लिया जाना चाहिए।
quickQuiz.answer: This decision should be taken quickly.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह जानकारी गुप्त रखी जानी चाहिए।
quickQuiz.answer: This information must be kept secret.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह project अगले महीने शुरू किया जाएगा।
quickQuiz.answer: This project will be started next month.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह सवाल आसानी से पूछा जा सकता है।
quickQuiz.answer: This question can be asked easily.

mustRememberRules: Modal passive: can be / should be / must be / may be + V3
Formula stays consistent: modal + be + V3
Used often in formal writing, news, and instructions
